description: Use this API to purge an individual active power dispatch table record from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = purge_opf_apdsp_tbl(tbl)

parameters.name: tbl
parameters.description: Active power dispatch table number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: active power dispatch table does not exist.
active power dispatch table still referenced – unable to delete.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
